```
class ConnectionMonitor
  constructor(connection)
  start()
  stop()
  isRunning()
  recordMessage()
  recordConnect()
  recordDisconnect()
  startPolling()
class Connection
  constructor(consumer)
  send(data)
  open()
  if(this.webSocket)
  close({allowReconnect: allowReconnect} = { allowReconnect: true })
  if(!allowReconnect)
  reopen()
  getProtocol()
class Subscription
  constructor(consumer, params = {}, mixin)
  perform(action, data = {})
  send(data)
  unsubscribe()
class SubscriptionGuarantor

```

```
  send(data)
  open()

  getProtocol()
```

### actiontext/app/assets/javascripts/actiontext.esm.js
```
class FileChecksum
  static create(file, callback)
  constructor(file)
  create(callback)
  fileReaderDidLoad(event)
  fileReaderDidError(event)
  readNextChunk()
  if(this.chunkIndex < this.chunkCount || this.chunkIndex == 0 && this.chunkCount == 0)
class BlobRecord
  constructor(file, checksum, url, customHeaders = {})
  if(csrfToken != undefined)
  status()
  response()
  if(responseType == "json")
  create(callback)
  requestDidLoad(event)
  if(this.status >= 200 && this.status < 300)
class BlobUpload
  constructor(blob)
  for(const key in headers)
  create(callback)
  requestDidLoad(event)
  if(status >= 200 && status < 300)
  requestDidError(event)
class DirectUpload
```

### actiontext/app/javascript/actiontext/attachment_upload.js
```
export class AttachmentUpload
  constructor(attachment, element, file = attachment.file)
  start()
  directUploadWillStoreFileWithXHR(xhr)
  if(progress)
  simulateResponseProgress(xhr)
  if(xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE && progress < 99)
  estimateResponseTime()
  if(fileSize < MB)
```

### actionview/lib/action_view/helpers/text_helper.rb
```
module ActionView
  def concat(string)
  def safe_concat(string)
  def truncate(text, options = {}, &block)
  def highlight(text, phrases, options = {}, &block)
  def excerpt(text, phrase, options = {})
  def pluralize(count, singular, plural_arg = nil, plural: plural_arg, locale: I18n.locale)
  def word_wrap(text, line_width: 80, break_sequence: "\n")
  def simple_format(text, html_options = {}, options = {})
  def cycle(first_value, *values)
  def current_cycle(name = "default")
  def reset_cycle(name = "default")
  def initialize(first_value, *values)
  def reset
  def current_value
  def to_s
  def next_index
  def previous_index
```

```
class FileChecksum
  static create(file, callback, options = {})
  constructor(file, options = {})
  create(callback)
  if(algorithmConfig)
  fileReaderDidLoad(event)
  fileReaderDidError(event)
  readNextChunk()
  if(this.chunkIndex < this.chunkCount || this.chunkIndex === 0 && this.chunkCount === 0)
class BlobRecord
  constructor(file, checksum, url, customHeaders = {})
  if(csrfToken != undefined)
  status()
  response()
  if(responseType == "json")
  create(callback)
  requestDidLoad(event)
  if(this.status >= 200 && this.status < 300)
class BlobUpload
  constructor(blob)
  for(const key in headers)
  create(callback)
  requestDidLoad(event)
```

### railties/lib/rails/generators/rails/app/templates/Dockerfile.tt
```
FROM docker.io/library/ruby:$RUBY_VERSION-slim AS base
FROM base AS build
FROM base
EXPOSE 3000 80
ENTRYPOINT ["/rails/bin/docker-entrypoint"]
CMD ["./bin/rails", "server"]
CMD ["./bin/thrust", "./bin/rails", "server"]
ENV RAILS_ENV
ENV PATH
ENV BUN_INSTALL
ENV PATH
ARG RUBY_VERSION
ARG NODE_VERSION
ARG YARN_VERSION
ARG BUN_VERSION
```

